message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 228 migrate 3 ambient IPC pane-priority + user-var sites to cx-first (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Fifth cross-crate caller migration. Migrates 3 additional ambient
IpcClient call sites in frankenterm/main.rs to cx-first entry
points:

1. L23905: `client.clear_pane_priority_with_cx(&cx, pane_id)` —
   inside the pane-priority CLI command.

2. L23913: `client.set_pane_priority_with_cx(&cx, pane_id, weight, Some(ttl_ms))` —
   same command, different branch.

3. L27584: `client.send_user_var_with_cx(&cx, pane, name, value)` —
   the user-var-forward daemon path.

All three sites use the standard
`Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern from
ticks 224-227. Routes through
IpcClient::<method>_with_cx → send_request_with_id_with_cx →
cx-first socket I/O (connect / write / flush / read).

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
